summary: High‑energy 1995 performance that fans say “rocked” and “rain sweet,” captured in a lively recording despite limited technical details.
review: Both reviewers are enthusiastic, rating the show 4–5 stars and praising its overall vibe (“THIS SHOW ROCKED”, “Last SOTM ever”). No specific comments about soundboard vs. audience or audio fidelity were provided, so the recording quality remains unclear but appears listenable enough for fans to recommend it.

ai_rating.rationale: Two strongly positive reviews give an average rating of 4.5; without recording details the score is weighted toward show quality, yielding a solid 4.3 overall.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on clarity or mix; reviewers' enthusiasm suggests the audio is at least listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans describe the concert as a high‑energy, rocking show but give no specifics about song flow.
